Other Requirements

“C-” or higher in all Smith required courses.

• Overall combined 2.000 GPA in Smith required courses.

• 50% of BMGT credits completed at UMCP.

• 60 credits earned at a 4-year school. Requirement is not applicable to students who matriculated Fall 2022 or later.

• Last 30 credits at UMCP.

• Overall cumulative GPA of 2.000 at UMCP.
